Body.Content:
The update enables SharePoint Embedded Administrators (SPE Admins) to identify the different kind of containers (user, tenant, and group) and the principal owner associated with the container.

GA date: January CY2025
Body.Markdown:
The update enables SharePoint Embedded Administrators (SPE Admins) to identify the different kind of containers (user, tenant, and group) and the principal owner associated with the container.

GA date: January CY2025

Details.Name: Summary
Details.Value: The update enables SharePoint Embedded Administrators (SPE Admins) to identify the different kind of containers (user, tenant, and group) and the principal owner associated with the container.

message.Title: SharePoint: Additional support on SPAC to identify different types of Embedded containers and their principal owner
